review.note: AI-drafted first pass - SME review required before production

slides.title: Ukufunda Kubarholi
slides.lead: Hlangana nabarholi abane abanesibindi bewuthole iinkambiso ezihle abangasifundisa zona.

media.alt: Iimfanekiso ezine ezinemibala ezijame ndawonye ngaphasi kwelanga elikhanyako.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='130' width='320' height='50' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='270' cy='42' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/><g><circle cx='70' cy='78' r='14' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='60' y='94' width='20' height='40' rx='4' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='120' cy='72' r='14' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='110' y='88' width='20' height='46' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='170' cy='78' r='14' fill='#3f6b9b'/><rect x='160' y='94' width='20' height='40' rx='4' fill='#3f6b9b'/><circle cx='220' cy='72' r='14' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='210' y='88' width='20' height='46' rx='4' fill='#7a5a3a'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Yamukela ikilasi ngokufudumeleko. Tjela abafundi bona namhlanjesi bazokuhlangana nabarholi abane bamambala emlandweni. Hlathulula bona asifundi kwaphela lokho abarholi abakwenzako - sifunda neenkambiso ezihle abazitjengisako, njengobulungisa, isibindi nomusa. Buza: ngubani umrholi omaziko? Utitjhere, umqeqetjhi, namtjhana umbelethi?

slides.title: Uyini umrholi?
slides.lead: Umrholi mumuntu osiza abanye abantu abebatjengise indlela ehle yokukhamba.

blocks.text: **Umrholi** mumuntu abanye abantu abakhetha ukumlandela. Abarholi abahle ababosi kwaphela. Batjhejile ngabanye abantu bebalinge ukwenza lokho **okulungileko** **nokuqondileko**.

items: Abarholi abahle balalela abanye baphathe woke umuntu ngokulinganako.
Banesibindi begodu bajamele okuqondileko, ngitjho nanyana kubudisi.
Singafunda **iinkambiso** ezihle kibo, njengokuthembeka, umusa nethemba.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa ilimi elilula ku-Ibanga 4. Hlathulula ibizo elithi 'iinkambiso' ngokulula: iinkambiso zizinto ezihle esizikholelwako nesilinga ukuzenza. Tlola amabizo ambalwa weenkambiso ebhodini (ubulungisa, isibindi, umusa, ithemba). Abafundi bazobona iinkambisezi kiwoke umrholi namhlanjesi.

slides.title: Nelson Mandela
slides.lead: Umsana ovela emakhaya owakhula waba mrholi weSewula Afrika yoke.

blocks.text: **Nelson Mandela** wabelethwa ngo-1918 esigodini esincani se-Eastern Cape. Umndeni wakhe bewumbiza ngokuthi *Rolihlahla*. Njengomuntu omdala wasebenzela ukwenza iSewula Afrika ilunge **ebantwini boke**, kungakhathaliseki umbala wesikhumba sabo.

items: Kade, iSewula Afrika beyinemithetho engakalungi ephatha abantu ngokuhlukileko ngombala.
UMandela wajamela imithetho engakalungi le.
Wafakwa ejele iminyaka ema-27, kodwana akhenge alahle ithemba.

media.alt: Umfanekiso othulileko wendoda ehlekako enezinwele ezimhlophe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 180' role='img'><rect width='180' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='90' cy='96' r='60' fill='#dcd3c2'/><circle cx='90' cy='82' r='34' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M56 78 a34 34 0 0 1 68 0 q-34 -22 -68 0 Z' fill='#e6e1d8'/><path d='M62 118 q28 26 56 0 v40 h-56 Z' fill='#3f6b9b'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlathulula ubandlululo (i-apartheid) ngobunono nangokulula ebafundini abancani: kade, imithetho engakalungi beyihlukanisa abantu ngombala wesikhumba sabo begodu beyingakalungi. Ungangeni eenzathwini ezinzima. Gxila ekuzimiseleni nasethenjini lakaMandela. Iminyaka ema-27 ejele itjengisa bona bekakhathala kangangani.

slides.title: Ukulibalela nobulungisa
slides.lead: Nakaphuma ejele, uMandela wakhetha ukuthula kunelaka.

blocks.text: Ngo-1994 iSewula Afrika yaba nekhetho layo lokuthoma lapho **woke umuntu** bekangavota khona. UMandela waba mongameli wethu wokuthoma okhethwe ngentando yenengi. Wabawa abantu bona **balibalele** basebenze ndawonye.

items: Inkambiso: **ukulibalela** - ukudedela ilaka bona kwakhiwe ukuthula.
Inkambiso: **ubulungisa** - woke umuntu kufuze aphathwe ngokulinganako.
Inkambiso: **ithemba** - ukukholelwa bona izinto zingaba ngcono.

slides.notes: Lokhu kuyihliziyo yendaba kaMandela ku-Ibanga 4: bekangaba nelaka ngemva kwejele, kodwana wakhetha ukulibalela nokuthula. Buza abafundi: nini lapho walibalela umngani? Bewuzizwa njani? Hlanganisa inkambiso nokuphila kwabo.

slides.title: Mahatma Gandhi
slides.lead: Umrholi otjengise bona ungajamela okuqondileko ngaphandle kokulwa.

blocks.text: **Mohandas Gandhi** weza eSewula Afrika avela e-India ngo-1893 azokusebenza njengommeli. Lapha waphathwa ngokungakalungi ngombana bekamuntu we-India. Lokhu kwenza bona aqunte ukulwisana nemithetho engakalungi - kodwana **ngendlela enokuthula**.

items: UGandhi wafundisa abantu ukuveza umbono **ngaphandle kwebudlhabhalazi**. Wakubiza ngokuthi *satyagraha*, okutjho 'amandla weqiniso'.
Abantu balandela isibonelo sakhe bebala ukulalela imithetho engakalungi.
Ngokukhamba kwesikhathi wabuyela e-India wasiza ukurholela inarha yakhe ekukhululekeni. Abanengi bambiza ngokuthi *Mahatma*, okutjho 'umphefumulo omkhulu'.

media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 180' role='img'><rect width='180' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='90' cy='96' r='60' fill='#dcd3c2'/><circle cx='90' cy='78' r='30' fill='#c9a37a'/><circle cx='80' cy='76' r='7' fill='none' stroke='#3a3a3a' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='100' cy='76' r='7' fill='none' stroke='#3a3a3a' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='87' y1='76' x2='93' y2='76' stroke='#3a3a3a' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M64 112 q26 22 52 0 v44 h-52 Z' fill='#f0ece3'/><line x1='128' y1='96' x2='128' y2='156' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlathulula i-satyagraha ngokulula njenge 'amandla weqiniso' namtjhana 'ukuveza umbono ngokuthula'. Umqondo oqakathekileko ku-Ibanga 4: uGandhi watjengisa bona ungaba namandla nesibindi ngaphandle kokulimaza umuntu. Tjheja bona imibono kaGandhi enokuthula ngokukhamba kwesikhathi yakhuthaza uMandela nabanye abarholi ephasini loke.

slides.title: Iqiniso nokuthula
slides.lead: UGandhi bekakholelwa bona into enamandla khulu ongayenza kukuhlala unokuthula uthembekile.
slides.notes: Sebenzisa amakarada amathathu njengeendaba zokukhuluma. Buza abafundi iimbonelo zekilasi: singararulula njani ukuphikisana ngokuthula esikolweni? Singakhuluma njani iqiniso ngitjho nanyana sisaba? Kwenze kusebenze begodu kube seduze nephaseli labo.

slides.title: IKosi Albert Luthuli

blocks.text: **Albert Luthuli** bekatitjhere wesikolo neKosi yamaZulu. Waba mrholi we-African National Congress (ANC), iqembu ebelisebenzela amalungelo alungileko wawo woke amaSewula Afrika. NjengoGandhi, bekakholelwa ekuvezeni umbono **ngokuthula**.

items: Ngo-1960 wathumba **iNobel Peace Prize** - umklomelo odumileko khulu wabantu abasebenzela ukuthula.
Bekamuntu wokuthoma we-Afrika ukuthumba umklomelo lo.
Wafundisa abantu ukuba nesineke, ukuzola nokuba nesibindi.

media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 180' role='img'><rect width='180' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M76 40 l-18 44 h20 l12 -40 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M104 40 l18 44 h-20 l-12 -40 Z' fill='#3f6b9b'/><circle cx='90' cy='112' r='40' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='90' cy='112' r='30' fill='#f0c467'/><path d='M90 92 l6 18 h19 l-15 11 6 18 -16 -11 -16 11 6 -18 -15 -11 h19 Z' fill='#b9821f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gxila kuLuthuli njengomrholi onokuthula owahlonitjhwa ephasini loke. Hlathulula iNobel Peace Prize ngokulula: umklomelo okhethekileko wabantu abasiza ukuletha ukuthula. Ukuba mAfrika wokuthoma ukuwuthumba ngo-1960 kutjengisa bona iphasi lalihlonipha indlela yakhe enokuthula. Hlanganisa iinkambiso zakhe nokuveza umbono ngokuthula kwakaGandhi.

slides.title: Walter Sisulu
slides.lead: Umrholi ohlakaniphileko nothembekileko owanqophisa wasekela abanye.

blocks.text: **Walter Sisulu** bekamngani omkhulu nomsizi kaNelson Mandela. Bekaziwa ngokuba **hlakaniphileko** nokupha iseluleko esihle. Wasebenza budisi bona woke amaSewula Afrika aphathwe ngobulungisa.

items: Wasiza abarholi abatjha, kubandakanya uMandela, bona bakhule barhole.
NjengoMandela, wathunyelwa ejele ngokujamela imithetho engakalungi.
Akhenge ayekele ukukholelwa eSewula Afrika elungileko nekhululekileko.

media.alt: Iimfanekiso ezimbili ezijame eduze, esinye sibeke isandla ehlombe lesinye.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 180' role='img'><rect width='200' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='140' width='200' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='70' cy='60' r='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='54' y='82' width='32' height='58' rx='6' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='130' cy='60' r='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='114' y='82' width='32' height='58' rx='6' fill='#3f6b9b'/><rect x='84' y='90' width='34' height='9' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/></svg>

slides.notes: USisulu ufundisa inkambiso yokuthembeka, ukuhlakanipha nokusekela abanye - umrholi akutlhogeki bona abe mumuntu odume khulu bona abe qakathekileko. Hlathulula bona uSisulu wasiza waqeqetjha uMandela. Buza abafundi: ngubani okusizako akusekele? Bangamsiza njani bebasekele umngani?

slides.title: Iinkambiso abarholi bethu abazabelanako
slides.lead: Abarholi abane abahlukileko, kodwana beneenkambiso ezihle ezifanako ezinengi.

blocks.heading: Ubulungisa
blocks.text: UMandela bekafuna bona woke umuntu aphathwe ngokulinganako.

blocks.heading: Ukuthula
blocks.text: UGandhi noLuthuli bakhetha ukuthula, ingasi ibudlhabhalazi.

blocks.heading: Isibindi
blocks.text: Boke abane bebanesibindi, ngitjho nanyana kuyingozi.

slides.notes: Isilaydi lesi sihlanganisa abarholi abane ndawonye. Veza bona ngitjho nanyana bebaphila ngeenkhathi neendaweni ezihlukileko, bebanabelana iinkambiso. Buza abafundi bona ngiyiphi inkambiso abacabanga bona iqakatheke khulu nokuthi kubayini. Alikho ipendulo engakalungi - khuthaza ingxoxo.

slides.title: Ukukhamba ngesikhathi

events.label: UMandela uba mongameli; woke umuntu angavota

slides.notes: Siza abafundi bafunde ilayini yesikhathi elula kusuka ngesinceleni ukuya ngesidleni. Veza bona abarholaba baphila ngeenkhathi ezihlukileko, begodu ezinye iimpilo zabo zaphambana. Tjheja bona iminyaka ayikahleleki ngendlela eqondileko lapha ngamabomu - ungabawa abafundi bona basize ukuyihlela ngendlela efaneleko njengomsebenzi orabhako.

slides.title: Ukuba mrholi ekuphileni kwakho
slides.lead: Akutlhogeki bona udume bona ube mrholi omuhle.

blocks.text: Ungatjengisa iinkambiso ezihle ezifanako njengabarholaba **qobe langa** ekhaya, esikolweni nabangani bakho.

items: Yiba **nobulungisa** - yabelana upha woke umuntu ithuba.
Yiba **nomusa** - siza umuntu otshwenyekako.
Yiba **nesibindi** - jamela umngani ophathwa kumbi.
Yiba **thembekileko** - hlala ukhuluma iqiniso.

media.alt: Umfanekiso womntwana osiza omunye umntwana bona avuke, kunehliziyo ngaphezu kwabo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='124' width='220' height='36' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='80' cy='60' r='16' fill='#3f6b9b'/><rect x='68' y='78' width='24' height='46' rx='6' fill='#3f6b9b'/><circle cx='140' cy='72' r='16' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='128' y='90' width='24' height='34' rx='6' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='92' y='92' width='36' height='9' rx='4' fill='#3f6b9b'/><path d='M110 24 a9 9 0 0 1 16 0 a9 9 0 0 1 16 0 q0 12 -16 22 q-16 -10 -16 -22 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Letha isifundo ekuphileni kwabafundi. Lokhu kumnqopho we-CAPS: ukufunda iinkambiso kubarholi nokuzisebenzisa. Bawa omunye nomunye umfundi bona aqambe into yinye azoyenza ngeveke le ukutjengisa inkambiso ehle. Ungakwenza lokhu kube 'iboda leenkambiso' lekilasi.

slides.title: Buyekeza ukhumbule
slides.lead: Phendula imibuzo le utjengise lokho okufundileko ngabarholi bethu.

blocks.text: Namhlanjesi sihlangene nabarholi abane abanesibindi - **Nelson Mandela**, **Mahatma Gandhi**, **iKosi Albert Luthuli** no**Walter Sisulu** - neenkambiso ezihle abasifundisa zona.

blocks.question: Qamba abarholi ababili ofunde ngabo namhlanjesi nenkambiso yinye omunye nomunye asifundisa yona.
UGandhi noLuthuli boke bebakholelwa endleleni yinye ekhethekileko yokujamela okuqondileko. Beyiyini?
Tlola ngenkambiso yinye evela esifundwenesi nokuthi ungayitjengisa njani esikolweni ngeveke le.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu le njengomsebenzi otloliweko namtjhana ingxoxo yekilasi. Umbuzo 1 uhlola ukukhumbula, umbuzo 2 uhlola ukuzwisisa (ukuveza umbono ngokuthula / ukungabi nebudlhabhalazi), begodu umbuzo 3 ubawa abafundi bona basebenzise inkambiso ekuphileni kwabo, okuvumelana nomnqopho we-CAPS. Ncoma umzamo ukhumbuze abafundi bona nanyana ngubani angaba mrholi omuhle ngokuphila iinkambiso ezihle.
